forbids: public facade leaks; new src/lib feature files; unapproved direct Effect/process/fs/env/time/child-process access; authored artifact ownership drift
why: Habitat must model the same professional boundaries it enforces for other repositories: public contracts stay explicit, vendors/providers stay behind providers, and host/resource access stays at named edges.
remediate: Move implementation logic to the owning domain/provider/resource, expose only stable DTO/schema surfaces from src/public, or update the guard allowlist with a packet-owned closure action.
message: Habitat public surface or side-effect guardrail failed.
